overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through an elevated pedestrian walkway, transitioning through a covered plaza and descending into an underground market with neon-lit vendor stalls. The environment features brutalist concrete architecture with teal accent lighting and holographic billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass windows overlooking city

events.description: camera briefly turns left to glance down at the street through the glass windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered elevated corridor with fluorescent overhead lighting

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete pillars supporting the walkway roof
long rectangular fluorescent lights mounted on the ceiling
large glass windows providing view of the city street below
cyan colored LED strip lighting along the lower wall edges

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk through an elevated concrete pedestrian walkway at night. The corridor is lit by overhead fluorescent lights with teal accent lighting along the walls, and glass windows on the left reveal the city below. The space is empty of people, creating a quiet, atmospheric mood.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of elevated walkway approaching exit doorway

events.description: reaches the end of the corridor and exits the covered walkway structure

agents.ego_description: approaching the exit of the walkway while continuing forward

entered.detail: large concrete doorway marking the end of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the final section of the elevated walkway, approaching a concrete exit frame. The glass windows and accent lighting fall behind as the exit approaches, maintaining the empty, quiet atmosphere of the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban plaza with descending ramp and digital billboards

events.description: exits the enclosed walkway and turns right onto a descending ramp into a covered plaza

agents.ego_description: turning right and walking down a concrete ramp into a lower plaza level

entered.detail: sloped concrete walkway descending to a lower level
metal chain link fence along the right side of the ramp
large illuminated billboard displaying SET SAIL advertisement
concrete overhead covering of the plaza area

segments.scene_description: Exiting the walkway, the scene opens into a covered urban plaza. The camera turns right and descends a concrete ramp, passing chain link fencing and approaching large digital billboards. The lighting shifts from pure fluorescent to a mix of ambient city light and artificial illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: underground market with vendor stalls and neon signage

events.description: enters populated underground market area with vendor stalls and pedestrian NPCs
approaches large wall-mounted billboard while continuing through the market

agents.ego_description: walking through the underground market past various vendor stalls and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in white coat walking ahead through the market stalls
vendor standing behind a food stall with warm lighting

entered.detail: wooden food stall with warm interior lighting and counter
green neon circular sign with OPEN text
massive illuminated billboard reading NEW JOB? GET AN UPGRADE!
vertical cyan neon tube lights hanging from the ceiling
large green dumpsters and trash containers

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a bustling underground market filled with vendor stalls, neon signs, and pedestrians. The camera walks past a food stall with a green neon OPEN sign and continues toward a massive wall billboard advertising upgrades. The atmosphere shifts from empty and quiet to moderately crowded with warm market lighting mixing with cool neon tones.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sterile, elevated walkway into the vibrant chaos of a subterranean market. It begins with a quiet walk through a concrete corridor defined by overhead fluorescent lights and teal accents, with glass windows revealing the city below. As the camera reaches the end of the walkway, the enclosed space opens into a covered urban plaza where the perspective turns right to descend a concrete ramp past chain link fencing and glowing digital billboards. The scene then shifts from the ambient city light of the plaza into a bustling underground market filled with pedestrians and neon-lit vendor stalls. Finally, the camera passes a food stall with a green neon sign and moves toward a massive wall billboard advertising upgrades, as the atmosphere transforms from empty silence to a crowded, neon-drenched hub.
